2372560.name: Back To The Dark
2372560.description:
Do you enjoy dungeonering in the dark?
What about when the dark is even... darker?
Then you'll love Back To The Dark!

Singleplayer medieval-fantasy extraction melee-looter with the occasional arrow and spell.

Can you survive the encroaching dark long enough to extract through a blue escape portal? Or will you be forced to delve deeper in the darkness through a red portal?

Oh and don't forget to loot some treasure.

Features (Demo 2)

  • 6 Playable Classes: Soldier, Archer, Marauder, Mage, Thief, Monk
  • Multiple weapons per class, with chained attacks!
  • 3 Dungeons levels!
  • Tutorial dungeon!
  • Various monster types, including spiders!
  • Armour!
  • Potions!
  • Jewellery!
  • XP, levels, attributes!
  • Treasure!

Not Yet Included

  • Skills
  • Perks
  • "Useful" spells
  • More weapons
  • More treasure
  • More mobs!
  • More dungeons!
  • More coming soon!
